title: Brandons Core
description: Brandon's Core is a library mod used by most of my mods.
body:
Brandon's Core is a library mod used by most of my mods. 
Contains core code for blocks, items, guis, etc. 
Also includes a few useful utility commands.

I am partnered with CreeperHost! Use promo code `brandon30557nc` at checkout for 15% off your first month
[https://www.creeperhost.net/partner/brandon30557nc](https://www.creeperhost.net/partner/brandon30557nc)
